channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Dodoma City Hospital helps reduce patient congestion and improves healthcare services
item.description: The new Dodoma City Hospital, which started operations in 2023, is helping reduce the heavy patient load at Dodoma Regional Hospital and Makole Health Centre. The facility, constructed with over Sh2.7...

item.title: Delhi CM inspects Aruna Asaf Ali Hospital, directs measures for summer preparedness
item.description: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta carried out an unannounced visit to Aruna Asaf Ali Hospital on Thursday to review the hospital’s readiness and services. During her inspection, she spoke with doctors ...

item.title: Meru Woman Fulfils Lifelong Dream by Building Fully Furnished 3-Bedroom Home for Her Mother
item.description: A young woman from Meru County has touched many after fulfilling a personal dream of improving her family’s living conditions by building her mother a fully furnished three-bedroom bungalow. Winnie sh...

item.title: Tanzanian golfer Madina Idd plans increased participation in WAGR tournaments to climb global rankings
item.description: Tanzanian golfer Madina Idd has shared her clear ambition to take part in more World Amateur Golf Ranking (WAGR) tournaments in order to improve her position on the global amateur golf leaderboard. Sp...

item.title: Nine individuals face charges over hazing incident at PNPA
item.description: Nine individuals, including seven cadets and two police officers, are facing criminal charges over the hazing of 22 plebes at the Philippine National Police Academy (PNPA). The charges were filed unde...

item.title: Global Summit of 53 Nations to Discuss Phasing Out Fossil Fuels and Transition to Renewable Energy
item.description: In a historic move, over 50 nations are meeting in Santa Marta, Colombia, to discuss strategies for phasing out fossil fuels such as coal, oil, and gas. This summit, originally planned before the esca...

item.title: Jai Opetaia says he has been assured of a future world title opportunity after signing with Zuffa
item.description: Australian boxer Jai Opetaia has revealed that he has been promised a shot at a world title following his recent signing with combat sports organisation Zuffa. Speaking after the announcement, Opetaia...

item.title: Pakistan Issues Tender for LNG Cargoes Amid Rising Energy Demand
item.description: Pakistan LNG Limited has issued its first spot tender for LNG since December 2023, as the country grapples with supply shortfalls, partly caused by disruptions in global LNG supply chains. The tender,...

item.title: Decline of rural congregations leaves historic Welsh church at risk, as communities seek ways to preserve heritage buildings
item.description: The article examines the closure and deterioration of St Tyfrydog’s Church on Anglesey, Wales, as part of a broader trend affecting thousands of religious buildings across the UK. Once an active place...

item.title: Planned reforms to maternity services in England aim to reduce pregnancy-related deaths
item.description: The article appears to report on planned reforms by the NHS in England aimed at improving maternal care and reducing pregnancy-related deaths. Although access to the full content was restricted, the h...

item.title: Anglican Priest Killed in Overnight Attack in Adamawa
item.description: Gunmen have killed Emmanuel Ezeokwe, an Anglican priest, in an attack that took place early on Tuesday morning at his vicarage in Zinai community, Song Local Government Area of Adamawa State. The assa...

item.title: Jeff Koinange recounts transition from aviation career to journalism
item.description: Veteran Kenyan media personality Jeff Koinange has shared detailed insights into how he transitioned from a promising aviation career into journalism, which later made him one of the most recognisable...

item.title: Australia’s Rental Market Faces Affordability Crisis as Renters Hit Their Limits
item.description: Australia's rental market may be reaching a tipping point as renters across capital cities face rising affordability challenges. According to a recent report by Domain, rental vacancy rates have falle...

item.title: PM Shehbaz congratulates Pakistani astronomers selected for China’s space programme, highlights future of space research
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met two Pakistani astronomers, Zeeshan Ali and Khurram Daud, who have been selected for China’s manned space programme, and congratulated them on this major achievement. ...

item.title: Australian Farmers Face Rising Mouse Numbers with Potential for Another Plague
item.description: Australia is grappling with a significant increase in mouse populations, reminiscent of the 2021 plague, particularly in Western and South Australia. Mouse numbers are reportedly hitting concerning le...

item.title: Delays in phasing out coal power in South Africa linked to major health and economic risks
item.description: A recent report by Greenpeace, the Centre for Research on Energy and Clean Air, and the South African NGO GroundWork warns that postponing the decommissioning of coal-fired power stations in South Afr...

item.title: UK cancer diagnoses reach record high, with one diagnosis every 80 seconds
item.description: The article reports that cancer diagnoses in the United Kingdom have reached their highest recorded level, with new cases being identified at an average rate of one every 80 seconds. This reflects a s...

item.title: Fans React to Murder Charges Against Singer D4vd
item.description: D4vd, a young musician who rose to fame through viral hits like 'Romantic Homicide,' is now at the center of a criminal investigation following the discovery of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez's b...

item.title: Delhi High Court Directs Google and X to Take Down Videos of Kejriwal's Court Proceedings
item.description: In a significant development, the Delhi High Court has directed tech giants Google and X (formerly Twitter) to remove videos of the court hearing related to Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal's ongo...

item.title: PM highlights energy security measures that averted crisis in Pakistan during Middle East conflict
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif recently addressed a high-level meeting on energy security, emphasizing that the government's timely energy conservation measures helped avert a crisis in Pakistan amidst...
